documentation.text:
FederatedThreatRegistry — Phase 34
 Lightweight on-chain anchor for cross-bridge confirmed bot-farm cluster hashes.
 A single authorized bridge address reports cluster fingerprints; when ≥2 distinct
 reporters have reported the same hash, MultiVenueConfirmed is emitted.
 Privacy: only 32-byte hash values are stored — never raw device IDs.
 The cluster hash is derived from compute_cluster_hash() in federation_bus.py:
   SHA-256(sorted_device_ids.join("|"))[:16 bytes], zero-padded to 32 bytes.
 Architecture note: In the current single-bridge deployment, `onlyBridge` restricts
 reporting to the one authorized bridge address. Multi-bridge deployments would
 require upgrading to a whitelist pattern or separate deploying per bridge.

Emitted when ≥2 distinct reporters have confirmed the same cluster hash,
 indicating a coordinated bot farm operating across multiple bridge shards.

Report a cluster hash as confirmed by this bridge.
 Each bridge address may only report a given clusterHash once.
 Emits ClusterReported every time; emits MultiVenueConfirmed when
 the total reporter count reaches 2 (or more on subsequent reports).
 @param clusterHash 32-byte cluster fingerprint (16 significant bytes, zero-padded).
Return the number of distinct reporters for a given cluster hash.
Return true if the cluster has been confirmed by at least minBridges reporters.
Return true if a specific reporter address has already reported this cluster hash.

@title PHGCredential
 @notice ERC-5192-inspired soulbound on-chain credential registry for VAPI PHG humanity scores.
 Phase 28 — "The Credential Becomes a Portal"
 Each device that accumulates a PHG checkpoint AND submits a PITL session proof earns
 exactly one soulbound credential on-chain.  The credential records:
   - nullifierHash    — ZK anti-replay nullifier from PITLProver
   - featureCommitment — biometric commitment hash
   - humanityProbInt  — humanity_probability × 1000 (range [0, 1000])
   - mintedAt         — block.timestamp of first mint
 Design decisions:
   - No ERC-721 inheritance — avoids wallet-address requirement for Phase 28.
     A future phase will add NFT ownership once wallet linking is implemented.
   - locked() returns true for all credentials — ERC-5192 soulbound concept.
   - credentialOf[deviceId] == 0 is the "not minted" sentinel (_nextId starts at 1).
   - INSERT OR IGNORE semantics: AlreadyMinted + NullifierUsed errors prevent re-entry.
   - onlyBridge: only the designated bridge address can mint credentials.
 Access pattern mirrors PHGRegistry.sol and PITLSessionRegistry.sol.
@notice deviceId (bytes32 keccak of pubkey) → credentialId (0 = not minted)
@notice Returns true if the device has a minted credential.
@notice Returns full Credential struct for the device. Returns zero struct if not minted.

@notice All PHG credentials are permanently locked (soulbound, non-transferable).
         Returns true for any tokenId — this is the ERC-5192 locked() interface.

type":"bytes32"}],"name":"getCredential","outputs":[{"components":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"nullifierHash","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"featureCommitment","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"humanityProbInt","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"mintedAt","type":"uint256"}],"internalType":"struct PHGCredential.Credential","name":"","type":"tuple"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"deviceId","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"hasCredential","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"name":"locked","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"pure","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"deviceId","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"nullifierHash","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"featureCommitment","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"humanityProbInt","type":"uint256"}],"name":"mintCredential","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"id","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"usedNullifiers","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{"mintCredential(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,uint256)":{"params":{"deviceId":"keccak256(pubkey) device identifier","featureCommitment":"Biometric feature commitment hash from PITLProver","humanityProbInt":"humanity_probability \u00d7 1000, must be \u2264 1000","nullifierHash":"ZK proof nullifier \u2014 enforces one credential per session proof"},"returns":{"id":"              Assigned credentialId (\u2265 1) Reverts:   AlreadyMinted  \u2014 device already has a credential   NullifierUsed  \u2014 nullifier was used in a previous mint   InvalidScore   \u2014 humanityProbInt > 1000   OnlyBridge     \u2014 caller is not the bridge"}}},"title":"PHGCredential","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"credentialOf(bytes32)":{"notice":"deviceId (bytes32 keccak of pubkey) \u2192 credentialId (0 = not minted)"},"credentials(uint256)":{"notice":"credentialId \u2192 Credential data"},"deviceOfId(uint256)":{"notice":"credentialId \u2192 deviceId (reverse lookup)"},"getCredential(bytes32)":{"notice":"Returns full Credential struct for the device. Returns zero struct if not minted."},"hasCredential(bytes32)":{"notice":"Returns true if the device has a minted credential."},"locked(uint256)":{"notice":"All PHG credentials are permanently locked (soulbound, non-transferable).         Returns true for any tokenId \u2014 this is the ERC-5192 locked() interface."},"mintCredential(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,uint256)":{"notice":"Mint a soulbound PHG credential for a device."},"usedNullifiers(bytes32)":{"notice":"ZK nullifier anti-replay registry"}},"notice":"ERC-5192-inspired soulbound on-chain credential registry for VAPI PHG humanity scores. Phase 28 \u2014 \"The Credential Becomes a Portal\" Each device that accumulates a PHG checkpoint AND submits a PITL session proof earns exactly one soulbound credential on-chain.  The credential records:   - nullifierHash    \u2014 ZK anti-replay nullifier from PITLProver   - featureCommitment \u2014 biometric commitment hash   - humanityProbInt  \u2014 humanity_probability \u00d7 1000 (range [0, 1000])   - mintedAt         \u2014 block.timestamp of first mint Design decisions:   - No ERC-721 inheritance \u2014 avoids wallet-address requirement for Phase 28.     A future phase will add NFT ownership once wallet linking is implemented.   - locked() returns true for all credentials \u2014 ERC-5192 soulbound concept.   - credentialOf[deviceId] == 0 is the \"not minted\" sentinel (_nextId starts at 1).   - INSERT OR IGNORE semantics: AlreadyMinted + NullifierUsed errors prevent re-entry.   - onlyBridge: only the designated bridge address can mint credentials. Access pattern mirrors PHGRegistry.sol and PITLSessionRegistry.sol.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/PHGCredential.sol":"PHGCredential"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/PHGCredential.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc33a47617166b7cc50cfca1a84f322e5eb2a831f93658bff3de4dcfd8e6263e9","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7512e64d23d8a8491d70714b0658ffc71187c9d781dafd103889c3249c31d97b","dweb:/ipfs/Qmatgn3hiwVWSDedKZHwGz6uyAxZ85ALWwKTv8SyL1o1eN"]}},"version":1}
